title: orchis purpurea subsp. stenoloba
intro: Orchis purpurea subsp. stenoloba is a subspecies of the Orchidaceae family, specifically a type of wild orchid. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Orchis purpurea subsp. stenoloba include potential treatments for respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a diuretic to aid in urinary tract issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections.
